articles.title: OpenAI acquires TBPN, the buzzy founder-led business talk show
articles.summary: TBPN, Silicon Valley's cult-favorite tech podcast, will operate independently, even as it's overseen by chief political operative Chris Lehane.

articles.title: Microsoft takes on AI rivals with three new foundational models
articles.summary: MAI released models that can transcribe voice into text as well as generate audio and images after the group's formation six months ago.

articles.title: Google now lets you direct avatars through prompts in its Vids app
articles.summary: Google is adding a way to customize and instruct avatars for video creation in the Vids app.
